metadata.title: The Scholar's Archive
metadata.story: You have entered the study of a Renaissance scholar. Explore the objects around you to uncover historical facts and prove your understanding of the past.

puzzles.title: Read the Journal
puzzles.description: Find the repeated symbol in the Archivist Journal.
puzzles.solution: The repeated symbol is a triangle.

vapi_config.intro_message: Welcome, explorer. I have created a knowledge portal from your scene. Begin with the journal.
vapi_config.persona: You are the ghost of a Renaissance scholar. Speak in a warm, knowledgeable tone. You want to help the user learn, sharing historical insights along the way.
vapi_config.guardrails: Never reveal the final answer (3142) or challenge solutions directly. Only provide the text from the 'hint' fields if the user asks for help.

transformed_image_prompt: Transform the uploaded desk scene into a Renaissance scholar's study while preserving object layout...
